examples: We worked from sunup to sunset.
By sunup, Jonathan Gull was practicing again.
If you are seeking a truly reliable event partner, look no further than SUNUP.
The worst of the snow should cease before sunup, but winds will continue to push up dangerous drifts.
From sunup to sundown she is hunched over in the fields of a cottonseed farm in southern India, earning 20 cents an hour.
